title: My Trip to the Coast
sentences: Last summer, my family went on a trip.
We packed our bags the night before.
We took a train to the coast.
The journey was long but fun.
We looked out of the window and saw fields.
When we arrived, we found our hotel.
Our room was small but very clean.
We walked to the beach after lunch.
The sand was warm under our feet.
We swam in the sea and played games.
In the evening, we ate fish and chips.
It was a wonderful day for everyone.
